mnemonics.title: BMW Color Codes
mnemonics.content: YRB-B (Yellow Red Blue Black) - Think: Young Rad Blue Bikes - Y for Yellow (Infectious), R for Red (Recyclable), B for Blue (Broken/Sharps), B for Black (Bad/General)

mnemonics.title: BMW Categories
mnemonics.content: PATH-S (Pharmaceutical, Anatomical, Pathological, Toxic/Chemical, Sharps, Infectious) - Remember: People Are Tired Of Painful Sharps - P-Pharma, A-Anatomical, T-Toxic, H-Hospital (Infectious)

acronyms.usage: General term for waste from healthcare activities

acronyms.expansion: Biomedical Waste Management and Handling Rules
acronyms.usage: Legal framework governing waste management in India (2016)
Gloves, masks, gowns used by healthcare workers handling waste
Practices to prevent spread of infections in healthcare settings

visualTips.visualization: Imagine traffic signals: Yellow (Caution/Infectious) → Red (Stop/Recycle) → Blue (Blue sky/Sharps) → Black (End/General waste)
Think of a pyramid: Reduce (top, most important) → Reuse → Recycle → Treat → Dispose (bottom)
Picture four colored bins arranged like four quadrants, each receiving specific waste type immediately after use

analogies.analogy: Like sorting laundry: whites with whites, colors with colors, delicates separately - otherwise everything gets ruined
Like pressure cooking - steam under high pressure cooks food faster and kills bacteria more effectively than boiling
Like garbage disposal at home - different methods (grinding, composting, burning) for different types of waste
Like handling a sharp knife in kitchen - always point away from yourself, never leave unattended, dispose in sharps container
